name: ExtensionTransport_GroupIdentifier
title: R5: Requisition or grouper id (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Transport.groupIdentifier` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Transport.groupIdentifier` 0..1 `Identifier`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `Transport.groupIdentifier` 0..1 `Identifier`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Transport.groupIdentifier` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.groupIdentifier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `Transport.groupIdentifier` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.groupIdentifier` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.definition: A shared identifier common to multiple independent Request instances that were activated/authorized more or less simultaneously by a single author.  The presence of the same identifier on each request ties those requests together and may have business ramifications in terms of reporting of results, billing, etc.  E.g. a requisition number shared by a set of lab tests ordered together, or a prescription number shared by all meds ordered at one time.
